title: Senior Investment Banker at IDFC First Bank Consulting Pvt Ltd
company: IDFC First Bank Consulting Pvt Ltd

jsonLd.title: Senior Investment Banker at IDFC First Bank Consulting Pvt Ltd
jsonLd.description:
IDFC First Bank Consulting Pvt Ltd invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Investment Banker at our Chennai location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About IDFC First Bank Consulting Pvt Ltd:
IDFC First Bank Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Budgeting

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Annual performance appraisal
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IDFC First Bank Consulting Pvt Ltd!
